overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character traversing a coastal cliffside path during a dramatic sunset. The character moves through fields of tall white pampas grass, past fallen soldiers, and through a wooden torii gate as the sky transitions from golden orange to deep purple.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal hillside covered in white pampas grass

events.description: character transitions from walking to running pace

agents.ego_description: samurai walking through tall white pampas grass toward the setting sun over the ocean

entered.detail: tall white flowering grass covering the hillside and swaying in the wind
steep rock formation running along the left side of the path
calm sea visible beyond the cliff edge reflecting the sunset
bright golden sun low on the horizon creating lens flare
narrow dirt path winding through the tall grass

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a samurai walking through a dense field of white pampas grass on a coastal hillside. The golden sun sits low on the horizon directly ahead, backlighting the scene with warm orange light. Rocky cliffs rise on the left while the ocean is visible to the right. Around 8 seconds, the character breaks into a run.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliffside running path with scattered rocks

events.description: character passes fallen soldier bodies lying on the path

agents.ego_description: samurai running steadily along the cliffside path with sword strapped to his back

entered.detail: dead bodies of soldiers lying on the dirt path

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a clearer dirt path along the cliff edge. The tall grass gives way to scattered patches as the trail becomes more defined. Around 25 seconds, the samurai passes fallen soldier bodies on the ground. The rocky cliff face draws closer on the left while the ocean remains visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding rocky trail with stone lanterns approaching shrine entrance

events.description: sky transitions from golden orange to deep purple and pink hues as sun descends below horizon

agents.ego_description: samurai navigating the winding path as ambient light fades to twilight purple

entered.detail: massive moss-covered rock formation beside the path
traditional Japanese stone lantern post marking the path
individual pine trees along the cliffside

segments.scene_description: The path narrows and winds through rockier terrain as the lighting shifts dramatically from golden to deep purple twilight. The character passes a stone lantern and large boulders. The sun descends further right, casting long shadows as the sky turns vibrant pink and purple.

scene_state.functional_zone: shrine entrance through wooden torii gate in forest

events.description: character passes through the wooden torii gate marking sacred shrine grounds

agents.ego_description: samurai approaching and passing through the torii gate into the forested shrine area

entered.detail: traditional Japanese shrine gate with curved roof marking sacred entrance
thick forest canopy surrounding the path
thick forest canopy surrounding the path

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a wooden torii gate as the environment becomes densely forested. The sky is now deep purple visible through the tree canopy. At 52 seconds, the samurai passes through the torii gate, transitioning into the sacred shrine grounds surrounded by dense trees on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a coastal cliffside that transforms from a sun-drenched hillside into a twilight forest shrine. It begins with a samurai walking through dense white pampas grass backlit by a low, golden sun, before the character breaks into a run along a defined dirt path. As the trail clears, the camera passes fallen soldiers beside the rocky cliff face while the lighting shifts dramatically from warm orange to deep purple and vibrant pink. The scene then winds through rockier terrain past a stone lantern and large boulders as the sun descends further, casting long shadows across the landscape. Finally, the path leads into a dense forest where the samurai passes through a wooden torii gate and enters sacred shrine grounds under a deep purple sky.
